scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @f1/core build && pnpm exec concurrently -k "pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "pnpm exec vite" "pnpm exec wait-on file:dist/main.js tcp:5173 && pnpm exec electron ."
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @f1/core build && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm exec vite build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @f1/core build && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
